free_text: Measurement of double-differential thick-target
neutron yields of the C(d,n) reaction at 12, 20, and
30 MeV
- Chemical-form of target is element.
- Physical-form of target is solid.
- Target-thickness: 4 mm thick and 20 mm in diameter
HPGe
Total systematic uncertainty (about 7%)
detector efficiency
activity of the standard source
S.Shin
Received by e-mail from M.K.A.Patwary
ANG is polar angle (lab.) between beam and prompt
gamma
Beam intensity: 250 nA for 12 MeV EN, 210 nA for 20
MeV EN, 150 nA for 30 MeV EN
